title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Trader loses $2M in ‘same-block backrun extraction’ exploit
summary: Trader loses $2M in ‘same-block backrun extraction’ exploit
briefing: One crypto trader noted the $2 million loss could have been prevented had the victim read the transaction route before signing the transaction.

title: Yield Guild Games cuts 35 staff, shuts game publisher to focus on AI
summary: Yield Guild Games cuts 35 staff, shuts game publisher to focus on AI
briefing: Yield Guild Games said tough crypto and video game market conditions mean its YGG Play business is no longer commercially sustainable.

title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale may give BTC a ‘durable bottom,’ Grayscale says
summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale may give BTC a ‘durable bottom,’ Grayscale says
briefing: “Investors are now more confident about the instrument,” said Grayscale’s Zach Pandl regarding STRC, which reclaimed $90 for the first time in three weeks.

title: Trump says he became ‘a big crypto guy’ partly for politics
summary: Trump says he became ‘a big crypto guy’ partly for politics
briefing: US President Donald Trump once called Bitcoin “a scam,” but admitted on Monday that he got involved in crypto “a little bit for politics.”

title: L1s face decentralization 'tug-of-war' as adoption grows: Injective CEO
summary: L1s face decentralization 'tug-of-war' as adoption grows: Injective CEO
briefing: Blockchains will face increasing pressure to compromise on decentralization to meet user demand for speed and scalability, Injective CEO Eric Chen said.

title: US Bitcoin reserve hits snag as federal agencies debate for control: Bloomberg
summary: US Bitcoin reserve hits snag as federal agencies debate for control: Bloomberg
briefing: The report follows comments from White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt in May, who said the administration was examining the legal implications of creating a Bitcoin reserve.

title: Bitcoin bulls shake off Strategy's $216M BTC sale as price overtakes $64K
summary: Bitcoin bulls shake off Strategy's $216M BTC sale as price overtakes $64K
briefing: Bitcoin reversed course from its Monday open selloff and closed the day above $64,000 as bulls began to price in Strategy’s selling.

title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
summary: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
briefing: Beijing's first rules targeting emotional AI are forcing the country's biggest apps to shut down custom agents.

title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
summary: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
briefing: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
summary: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
briefing: The Bonk DAO wallet was exploited for roughly $20 million worth of the prominent dog-themed meme coin on Solana.

title: 'We Cannot Vibe Code the Future of Humanity', UN Chief Warns at AI Summit
summary: 'We Cannot Vibe Code the Future of Humanity', UN Chief Warns at AI Summit
briefing: António Guterres borrowed a Silicon Valley meme to make the starkest case yet for global AI oversight—then called for an international ban on killer robots.

title: Bitcoin Hits Highest Price in Weeks as Bernstein Analysts Maintain 'Ambitious' $150K Target
summary: Bitcoin Hits Highest Price in Weeks as Bernstein Analysts Maintain 'Ambitious' $150K Target
briefing: The financial firm admitted Bitcoin's retrace has been painful, but still holds a lofty year-end price prediction for the top crypto asset.

title: Yield Guild Kills Crypto Game Publishing Arm, Lays Off 35 in AI Pivot
summary: Yield Guild Kills Crypto Game Publishing Arm, Lays Off 35 in AI Pivot
briefing: Yield Guild Games is shutting down its YGG Play division and games like LOL Land, blaming the crypto market downturn and other factors.

title: Coinbase's AI System Hallucinated a World Cup Result Before the Match Even Started
summary: Coinbase's AI System Hallucinated a World Cup Result Before the Match Even Started
briefing: Coinbase said it updated its systems after an AI-generated alert incorrectly reported the outcome of the Norway-Brazil match before kickoff.

title: Over 150,000 People Signed Up to Masturbate With AI. Here's Why

briefing: Joi AI's search for 10 paid "masturbation consultants" drew more than 150,000 applicants. Here's what happened.
